TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Vic_Chou, title = Vic_Chou, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vic_Chou} }

S.FORM: Vic Chou Vic Chou u siwkay niza Vic Chou (1981.6.9) nalecuhan i Taywan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2008ŚĻī, . u sulit nu Amilika Vic Chou (Chinese: ŚĎ®śłĚśįĎ; pinyin: ZhŇću Y√ļm√≠n) is a Taiwanese actor, singer and commercial model. He is a member of the Taiwanese boy band F4, and has starred in Taiwanese dramas. It had a variation only in the middle character from his birth name, ŚĎ®Ťā≤śįĎ (pinyin: ZhŇću Y√Ļm√≠n) u kawlah niza
S.PHON: *i ¶ ¶ńßou *i ¶ ¶ńßou u siwkaj niza *i ¶ ¶ńßou (****.*.*) nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *****, . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika *i ¶ ¶ńßou ( ¶ńßin…ôs…ô: ***; pinjin: zńß*u j*m*n) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tor, siŇč…ôr and ¶omm…ôr ¶iar~…ĺ mod…ôr~…ĺ. ńß…ô is a m…ômb…ôr of tńß…ô taiwan…ôs…ô boj band f*, and ńßas starr…ôd in taiwan…ôs…ô dramas. it ńßad a *ariation onr~…ĺj in tńß…ô middr~…ĺ…ô ¶ńßara ¶t…ôr from ńßis birtńß nam…ô, *** (pinjin: zńß*u j*m*n) u kawr~…ĺańß niza
S.FORM: Vic Chou Vic Chou u siwkay niza Vic Chou (1981.6.9) nalecuhan i Taywan. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 2008ŚĻī, . u sulit nu Amilika Vic Chou (Chinese: ŚĎ®śłĚśįĎ; pinyin: ZhŇću Y√ļm√≠n) is a Taiwanese actor, singer and commercial model. He is a member of the Taiwanese boy band F4, and has starred in Taiwanese dramas. It had a variation only in the middle character from his birth name, ŚĎ®Ťā≤śįĎ (pinyin: ZhŇću Y√Ļm√≠n) u kawlah niza
